name: Cod with Garlic
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the fillets to make 8 servings.
2. Heat margarine or butter in a pan over medium heat until melted and shimmering.
3. Add vegetable oil and swirl to coat the pan.
4. Place the chopped garlic into the pan and sauté for about 30 seconds, stirring frequently, until fragrant but not browned.
5. Arrange the cod fillets in the pan, season with salt, and cook undisturbed until they reach an internal temperature of 115°F (46°C) on the thickest part for about 3-4 minutes per side.
6. Remove from heat and let rest for a minute before serving.
7. Garnish with snipped fresh cilantro.
